textByHashes.cabca66fc19b69d9e2e3e48cd847e6189df49eea: 'Ello, and what are you after then?
textByHashes.ced3f25ae701eb1a1e45c290904998ca0d2c0134: Is this regarding the Staff of Armadyl?
textByHashes.fbf66b27637fdba5fe377e02943e8611c4814590: I would love to tell you, but I'm afraid I am sworn to secrecy.
textByHashes.cc3dcb09827f6ddc6008b4d8748715cc4c3fc0c8: Willing? Yes. However, I must first ensure that me leaving Shilo Village will not be a problem...
textByHashes.9264f0136aaeb4a36ae1b7c9b94b8ccacf77579b: It seems my years of waiting are over. I have been granted leave to join your cause. Let Lucien tremble, for he will hear my laughter as his corrupt soul burns in the Abyss.
textByHashes.6dc2897dd9e38e8862ceecfb9558d190d675f618: I am ready to join you. I just need to make arrangements for while I am gone, but then I will depart for Falador.
textByHashes.64af6a1c8f8e1485c37272b46051b2c3aac1921c: 'Ello! It's good to finally be out of that hut. After all these years, it's started to feel like a prison.
textByHashes.55101828e7d8e813ca878739ee5e286347899dbd: Let's just say that you don't become the greatest Slayer Master without treading on some very important toes.
textByHashes.7a88081604da27a0be95f358f852bbf6339fb854: I'm afraid it is a secret that will go to my grave, friend.
textByHashes.7b172d997a7cfbf48b6c2eb5c2e7d4f760a1fcc5: Excellent, you're doing great. Your new task is to kill .
textByHashes.f3aa839fa0cd64749527916f22edb1e796c115ea: Good luck! Don't forget to come back when you need a new assignment.
textByHashes.bc8b075d49091ffc2ade7cb50821ee4f952aa266: You're still hunting ; you have to go. Come back when you've finished your task.
textByHashes.e81f713b73d0c12d2f9cefbb81e6b44f1367b13d: You're still hunting , with to go.
textByHashes.2d898591aa17e44eb9f3da32c2911ab6fe5031e0: I don't think that's a suitable task for you. Shall I cancel it? This will not wipe your task streaks.
textByHashes.4690813fc8fa29e4a7a15380409b6987d0454188: Alright, consider the task cancelled. You can now get a new assignment when you want one.
textByHashes.3936915ec951a366ea891abbd6196e29203cad0a: I have quite a few rewards you can earn, and a wide variety of Slayer equipment for sale.
textByHashes.c0dcd9325e7ced3243a9d9d8c6771fbe5de4c8db: The Slayer Masters may currently assign you any task in our lists, regardless of your combat level.
textByHashes.1cd9bdb2d0b412718114a85d06ea7585b9c1aee5: Okay, from now on, all the Slayer Masters will take your combat level into account when choosing tasks for you, so you shouldn't get anything too hard.
textByHashes.0e0b6ccc4a67de673135b9a90e4e5b040b7f149c: The Slayer Masters will take your combat level into account when choosing tasks for you, so you shouldn't get anything too hard.
textByHashes.47f277169b556d3646c41d8aa3ba877ceee4adb1: Okay, we'll keep checking your combat level.
textByHashes.dbd53e5f1c3835c46583db9ab8096068eaee8d1f: Okay, from now on, all the Slayer Masters will assign you anything from their lists, regardless of your combat level.
textByHashes.fb57f85bdb1fdecd173a8d6f3071fb91d8614d1d: This is a Slayer's Skillcape. Only a true Slayer master is permitted to wear one and in recognition of such an achievement, Slayer masters may be persuaded to allow you to select the same assignment in a row.
textByHashes.07017d33c38b99ae415748ef2a5b11052f7845bd: You need more training before you earn that honour, though.
textByHashes.fca915b5d77b9e67328c40dd7fd4115e1e5a276a: Well you have performed well as a student. I guess you have earned the right to wear such a prestigious cape now. The Slayer masters will recognize this cape and may offer you the same assignment twice in a row.
textByHashes.dc6b153e2af2c7e0cbee1e91a55d45a768002ee4: Okay. Well, if you change it back again, I will be waiting.
textByHashes.51fa37d1170bc1f1df9b1be904847b619638c195: Well, come back and see me when you do.
textByHashes.58f1fdd904d724b985799470ba396e43535885d8: Unfortunately all Skillcapes are only available with a free hood, it's part of a skill promotion deal; buy one get one free, you know. So you'll need to free up some inventory space before I can sell you one.
textByHashes.5bcec8e9ed26557d6f5513430380277f99178633: Bizarre, go on, what do you want then?
